args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Task checklist for implementing the 6-to-1-to-6 animated beam integrations layout on desktop and responsive grid on mobile. Track tasks for header, nodes, beams, CTA button, and build validation."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Integrations Section Animated Beam Checklist

- [/] Implement Animated Beam Integrations Block in `features-section-14.tsx`
  - [ ] Configure integrations header (Tag: `:: INTEGRATIONS ::`, H2: `Plays nicely with your stack`, subtext description)
  - [ ] Implement desktop view layout with 6 left nodes, 6 right nodes, and central AI Greentick logo
  - [ ] Setup 12 `AnimatedBeam` components connecting all nodes with green beams
  - [ ] Implement mobile fallback logo grid
  - [ ] Add centered CTA button: `View all integrations →`
- [ ] Run Next.js build to verify compilation
- [ ] Verify UI layout visually in local dev server
"
args.Description: "Update task.md to track integrations beam section tasks."
